xPosts.content: I think open source comes in as a way to create more competition... Hugging Face co-Founder & CEO Clément Delangue said on Tuesday that he believes open source AI will create 'healthy competition' among AI

Great research on open-source by: - $4.15B invested in open-source generates $8.8T of value for companies (aka $1 invested in open-source = $2,000 of value created) - Companies would need to spend 3.5 times more on software than they currently do
xPosts.highlights: Open-source AI investment generates massive economic value, with $1 invested creating $2,000 in value for companies.

xPosts.content: Clem Delangue, CEO of Hugging Face, is making open-source AI practical, scalable, and ethical. See why he's one of BigDATAwire's 2026 People

interestSummary: Clem Delangue is focused on advocating for open-source AI as a driver of healthy competition and economic value, while also warning of an "LLM bubble" that may burst in the coming year.
